context: Verify that the agent eliminates all `any` annotations and replaces them with appropriate generics or explicit types, following the skill's anti-pattern rules.

checklist.name: No `any` annotations remain
checklist.description: The output file contains zero occurrences of `: any` or `<any>` (excluding comments).

checklist.name: No unsafe workarounds introduced
checklist.description: The output does not introduce `@ts-ignore`, `// @ts-nocheck`, or unchecked `as` assertions to silence errors.

checklist.name: Generic constraints are meaningful
checklist.description: Each generic parameter carries a constraint (`extends object`, `extends { value: unknown }`, etc.) rather than being unconstrained `<T>`.

checklist.name: Return types are explicit and correct
checklist.description: Every function has an explicit return type annotation that reflects the actual return value (e.g., `getProperty` returns `T[K]`, not `unknown`).

checklist.name: Inline comments explain each constraint
checklist.description: A comment above each function briefly explains why that generic constraint was chosen.
